title: MP3/Audio Files Integration

posts.author: RowdyTeamRivera (Ivan with Rowdy Team Rivera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday!

I came across being able to add pictures and videos, but not audio files such as mp3s!

I created an On-Boarding dashboard for new team members and it would be great for them to be able to still be working while listening to podcasts.

We have Images, We have videos… so why not audios with an integrated player like we do for videos.

Screenshot 2023-03-14 1503371956×768 126 KB

posts.author: Annanorris (Anna Norris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hallow Monday.com Community,

It’s great that you’ve been able to add pictures and videos! Unfortunately, many platforms don’t natively support uploading audio files like MP3s directly. However, a useful workaround is to convert the audio into video format by pairing it with a static image, which allows you to upload it as a video. Alternatively, you can explore audio-focused platforms or tools that integrate with these sites for better MP3 support. I highly recommend checking out specialized apps or plugins designed for handling audio files, as they can simplify the process of sharing and integrating MP3s seamlessly.

Thanks for Regards…!!
